# D7 Labs

> D7 Labs builds AI-powered tools for churches. Our flagship product is Ezra Studio — a full sermon-content suite that turns each Sunday sermon into a searchable library and a week of ready-to-use ministry content. Sermon to Devotional is our first publicly-available capability: a $2.99 pay-per-document tool that anyone can use today without an account.

## About

- **Site**: https://d7labs.dev
- **Founder**: Davenson Lombard, senior software engineer (12+ years at MongoDB, Confluent, Ciena) and 18 years in church audio-visual ministry.
- **Based**: Montreal, Canada
- **Audience**: Pastors, small-group leaders, and church administrators in North America (English and French).
- **Differentiator**: Strict scripture-grounding — every sentence in generated content must be traceable to the sermon source. Pay-per-document pricing on the public tool ($2.99) instead of $30–$129/mo subscriptions.

## Products

### Ezra Studio (flagship — pre-launch)

Full sermon-content suite for churches. One sermon in → searchable library + a week of ministry content out: devotionals, discussion guides, social clips, study plans, and more. Built around three layers: Process (audio/video → transcripts and analysis), Search (semantic + keyword discovery across all sermons), and Converse (RAG chat scoped to a sermon, a church's library, or the platform).

- **Status**: Pre-launch, waitlist open
- **URL**: https://ezrastudio.ai

### Sermon to Devotional (public — live)

The first Ezra Studio capability available to the public. Paste a YouTube sermon link or upload a PDF transcript. In minutes, get a scripture-grounded 3-day devotional PDF. Each day contains a hook, scripture passage, reflection (4–6 paragraphs), application, and prayer. Available in English and French.

- **Status**: Live
- **Pricing**: Free preview (watermarked), $2.99 to download (PDF or DOCX)
- **No account, no subscription**
- **URL**: https://d7labs.dev/tools/sermon-to-devotional

### Chant d'Espérance (live, separate product)

Free hymnal and Bible reader app for Haitian and Francophone churches. 9 hymn books, 3 Bible translations, trilingual interface (French, English, Haitian Creole).

- **Status**: Live on iOS and Android
- **URL**: https://cesperance.com

## Pricing

- See [pricing.md](https://d7labs.dev/pricing.md) for machine-readable pricing.
